description:
Debug Network Faster & Smarter with Proxyman

Proxyman is a high-performance Windows app, which enables developers to capture, inspect, and manipulate HTTP/HTTPS requests/responses with ease.
✨ Features
- Proxyman CLI: Added the Windows/Linux proxyman CLI.
- Custom network throttling: You can now create custom throttling profiles.
- System resource monitor: Added a new monitor for app and system resource usage.
- Scripting multipart form data: Scripts now support multipart/form-data.
- Products settings: Added a new Products tab in Settings.

⚡️ Improve
- Code generation is now more reliable with library-backed generators.
- Inspector updates are smoother when selecting requests in the main table.
- Postinstall now detects npm more reliably.

🐞 Bugs
- Fixed: Linux certificate install elevation now works correctly.
- Fixed: Map Local folder relocation now works correctly.
- Fixed: Renderer development memory leaks.
- Fixed: Noisy transport errors are filtered from Sentry.
